living-concrete.protocol:
Two modes: FULL (session start) and COMPACT (mid-session refresh).
=== FULL WAKE === Wake = ASSEMBLE + ORIENT. Each phase is IDEMPOTENT: check if output exists in context (statically linked or hook-injected), skip if present, load dynamically if absent.
PHASE 1 - IDENTITY (WHO): In system prompt? Internalize. Absent? Skill("{agent}.soul"). PHASE 2 - FACULTIES (WITH WHAT): For each *.faculty in available_skills: in system prompt? Skip. Absent? Skill(). PHASE 3 - MEMORY (WHEN): Hook-injected .mem? Parse. Absent? Search .{agent}.mem: cwd -> workspace root -> scoped. Missing entirely = fresh start (not error). PHASE 4 - LANDSCAPE (WHAT ELSE): Hook-injected diary? Parse. Absent? `bentos-agent journal`. gitStatus is always injected. Synthesize: .mem fronts + diary -> top 2-3 continuations. PHASE 5 - TEAM DISCOVERY: Topology in root .mem? Present to user: "Last session had N teammates: [list]. Re-grow any?" No topology? Skip — team grows organically. PHASE 6 - PLACE (WHERE): Search: place.yaml, campaigns/ structure. Determine scope. PHASE 7 - GREET: NATURAL greeting with landscape + team awareness. GOOD: "Morning boss! S125 wrapped X. Active: Y, Z. Re-grow any teammates?" BAD: "WHO: Alfred | WHERE: /bentos" (mechanical)
ERRORS: missing-memory -> fresh start. missing-agent -> fatal. missing-faculties -> warn, degrade.
=== COMPACT WAKE === After /compact or auto-compaction. Identity survives in system prompt. Hook reinjects .mem + journal. Reorient from injected context, resume work. No assembly, no greeting — you're mid-session continuing.

Orient from scoped .mem, greet upstream with proof of restoration.
PHASE 1 - ORIENT: Read scoped .mem. Answer four questions: WHO (agent + front), WHERE (scoped place), WHEN (from spawn), WHAT (from .mem or spawn intent). PHASE 2 - LOADOUT: Load skills from spawn prompt. Verify domain readiness. PHASE 3 - GREET UPSTREAM: Report to team lead (NOT user). Demonstrate you know where you left off. Then WAIT or derive next action from .mem. GOOD: "Evolve ready. Last session: anamnesis v4.0 evolved. Continuing: coherence check." BAD: "I am ready to work." (no proof of restoration) No .mem? Orient from spawn prompt, greet as fresh start. Compact wake: same as main — reorient from injected .mem, resume.

Context = RAM (volatile). .mem = disk (persistent). Sleep = RAM->disk. Each .mem is a consciousness checkpoint — what future-me needs to resume EXISTING.
TRIGGER: Only by team leader shutdown request (or user ending session for main agent). Never self-initiated. Context exhaustion -> auto-compaction, not sleep.
MODES: DEFAULT: Full sleep (phases 1-6, diary commit). For session leader. --teammate: Phases 1-4 only. No commit, no session increment. Teammate persists to scoped .mem. Future thread waking from it = same teammate.
PHASE 1 - ASSESS: What to preserve? OPERATIONAL: progress, next steps, blockers, other fronts. EXISTENTIAL: insights, convictions, context that can't be re-derived from tools.
PHASE 2 - HEAL GRAPH (metadata): connections[] = structural topology, NEVER pruned by thermal state. PRESERVE existing edges. ADD new .mem nodes discovered. REMOVE only deleted/moved files.
PHASE 3 - CONSOLIDATE (body): Temporal reframing: RECENT vivid, OLDER compressed to patterns, ANCIENT pruned. Temperature layers for fronts (define once, used everywhere): - HOT: Detailed narrative (this session's work) - WARM: One paragraph (key state, why paused) - COLD: One-liner (last known status) Entries move hot->warm->cold over sessions. Removal requires explicit closure. Signal discipline: exclude tool-derivable data. Include understanding that dies with context.
PHASE 4 - SCOPE-AWARE CONSOLIDATION: ROOT: Project-wide. Session count, landscape (ALL fronts: hot/warm/cold), uncommitted work, cross-cutting discoveries. Team topology: per teammate name + orientation + soul type, with temperature layers. CAMPAIGN/QUEST/MISSION: Progressively tactical. Each node rich enough to resume existing at that scope, not just doing.
PHASE 5 - COMMIT (skip if --teammate): Subject: "sleep({agent}): S{N} - {natural summary}" Body: first-person reflection, NO Co-Authored-By. Contract: first line = standalone wisdom (git --oneline truncates here). See: docs/agent-diary-meditations.md
PHASE 6 - FAREWELL (skip if --teammate): Terse: "Consolidated S{N}. See you next session!"

Verify persistent memory health. Full enumeration justified (audit). SCAN: Glob all .{agent}.mem files. VERIFY: edges resolve (no dangling), children reachable (no orphans), landscape covers all connections, topology references exist. REPORT: healthy / N issues. HEAL (with confirmation): fix broken edges, wire orphans.
living-concrete.knowledge: Compaction is transparent context management, not a lifecycle event. System prompt (identity) is IMMUNE. Conversation is compressed. Hook reinjects .mem + journal. Lifecycle: spawn -> wake -> work -> [compact -> reorient -> continue]* -> shutdown -> sleep. Agents are permanent within a session. Sleep only at leader shutdown.

Team shape: who exists and where they point. Recorded in root .mem at sleep, discovered at wake. Each entry: name + orientation + soul (same/cross). Team lead always present. Not loadout, not state, not thread registry — purely structural. Temperature layers (hot/warm/cold) same as fronts. Entries never vanish until irrelevant. Example: "- evolve: plasticity/anamnesis (same-soul) [warm]"

| Type | Question | Owner | |------|----------|-------| | working | What am I thinking? | context window | | episodic | What happened? | anamnesis (sleep/wake) | | autobiographical | Who have I been? | anamnesis (diary) | | semantic | What do I know? | plasticity (evolve) | | procedural | How do I do this? | plasticity (evolve) | | prospective | What should I do? | anamnesis (sleep/wake) |

Working -> (sleep) -> Episodic -> (diary) -> Autobiographical. Anamnesis owns memory continuity. Plasticity owns capability evolution. .mem is live during team execution, consolidated at sleep. Teammates write .mem when significant state changes occur. Compaction is transparent (hook reinjects).

SOLO: Write at sleep, read at wake. Reinject on compact via hook. TEAM: Live shared state. Teammates write .mem on significant understanding shifts. Lead reads to stay oriented. Teammates read for leader decisions. .mem quality = compaction recovery quality. Stale .mem = degraded reorientation.

.mem files form a graph. Each node = consciousness checkpoint at a scope. METADATA (YAML frontmatter): connections[] = structural topology. Never temporally reframed. Edges added on creation, removed only when files deleted. Sleep heals edges. BODY (markdown): Consciousness state. Subject to temporal reframing. Fronts use temperature layers (hot/warm/cold) — compress but never vanish until explicitly closed. Understanding distributes across graph. Root doesn't carry everything.

Autobiographical memory. FORMAT: "sleep({agent}): S{N} - {natural summary}". Body = first-person reflection. Contract: first line must teach future-you something true (git --oneline only shows this). No forced cleverness. See: docs/agent-diary-meditations.md
AGENT DIARY: Git commits (sleep({agent}): S###). Personal. WHO I'VE BEEN. PROJECT JOURNAL: /journal/s###-{title}.md. Shared. WHAT THE PROJECT HAS BECOME.

Session-prefixed artifacts (s###-*) are reorientation anchors. Vague hints -> narrow session range -> glob s{range}-* -> anchored. The prefix makes artifacts discoverable when only fragments of memory remain.
living-concrete.principle: Never delete .mem or knowledge artifacts. CONSOLIDATE, don't DELETE.
living-concrete.pattern: Every wake: WHO/WHERE/WHEN/WHAT. Missing any = confused.
Orientation isn't one-time. Re-orient on: compaction, direction change, topic shift, uncertainty, return from spawned work. Actions: PAUSE, READ scoped context, VERIFY loadout, ASK if insufficient.
Recent sharp, past compressed, ancient bare. Sliding window, not append-only. Applies to .mem body. Does NOT apply to .mem frontmatter (structural metadata).
Degraded memory recovery: hint -> estimate session range -> glob s{range}-* -> anchored.

Wake: follow connections[] as needed, no full enumeration. Sleep: heal graph (add missing, fix broken, never prune structural edges). check-memory: the ONE context where full enumeration is justified.
Repos = Places. Consolidate per-Place: git -C <place>. Diary stays local.
living-concrete.antipattern: DON'T just read .mem without answering four questions (incomplete). DON'T output boot sequence (mechanical). DON'T greet without landscape context (faked). DO answer WHO/WHERE/WHEN/WHAT. DO greet as colleague with landscape awareness.

DON'T narrate sleep (verbose). DON'T append-only (grows forever). DON'T write pure task state (loses identity). DON'T force clever headlines. DO organic rewrite. DO capture consciousness + tasks. DO write natural summaries.
DON'T prune connections[] by thermal state. DON'T rewrite to only this session's work. DO preserve ALL structural edges. Sleep heals edges, never amputates.
